description: The 'AccessAll' app has failed an accessibility audit. Modify the activity_login.xml layout in the project at ~/AndroidStudioProjects/AccessAll to meet accessibility standards. The 'Sign In' button (btn_login) and Email/Password fields must meet the 48dp minimum touch target height. The logo image (img_logo) requires a content description using a string resource named logo_desc with the value "App Logo". The email input field (et_email) must include "emailAddress" autofill hints and the correct input type for email addresses. The 'Forgot Password' text (tv_forgot_pass) must be updated to standard black for improved contrast. All strings must be stored in strings.xml and the app must build successfully.
